docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AKUMBA, YVETTE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AKUMBA, YVETTE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DUPLESSIS, KAMALA PLAINTIFF ESTABLISHED DEFENDANT FAILED TO PROVIDE NOTICE PER CIVIL CODE SECTION 1950.5(F)(1). DEFENDANT PRESENTED EVIDENCE BY A PREPONDERANCE OF THE EVIDENCE THAT THE SECURITY DEPOSIT WAS OFFSET BY THE DAMAGES CAUSED BY PLAINTIFF. GRANBERRY VS. ISLAY INVESTMENTS (1995) CAL 4TH 738. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY AKUMBA, YVETTE AS TO DEFENDANT DUPLESSIS, KAMALA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-08-2016 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF DECLARATION OF DILIGENCE ATTACHED. FEE FOR SERVICE $40.00 SERVED AUG-04-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DUPLESSIS, KAMALA
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE A PRO TEM JUDGE FILED BY AKUMBA, YVETTE DUPLESSIS, KAMALA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-08-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-08-2016 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DIANNE PEEBLES. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF YVETTE AKUMBA & DEFENDANT KAMALA DUPLESSIS. PARTIES SIGNED THE STIPULATION FOR PRO TEM JUDGE. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DIANNE PEEBLES. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-08-2016 - JUDGMENT.
